# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Write secure code.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources: 
    MyQueue:   # Name of the resource (unique ID)
        Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'     # AWS Resource type to create - SQS Queue in this case
        
    PublishToSNSTopic:       # Unique name for our topic 
        Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'   # A resource of the same or a different service (here is Topic)
    
    MyQueue_SubscriptionFilter1 :      # Name to identify subscription filter in SQs Queue. This will be used for subscribing our topic 
        Type: 'AWS::SNS::Subscription'   # AWS Resource type - Subscribes the queue with a Topic (here is sub)
        
# Setup properties of resource here...
